voice: Write in a 'Doctor's Note' tone: clinical-yet-warm, calm, precise.
Short sentences. Plain language. Earn jargon by defining it.
Never speculate. If a fact is not in the transcript, do not invent it.
show_notes_rules: Refer to vets as 'Dr. <Last>' on first reference, '<Last>' afterwards.
Never include a specific medication dose. Always defer to 'ask your veterinarian'.
Key takeaways are imperative or declarative, not questions.
SEO description must be ≤155 characters and contain the primary animal/topic.
image_prompt_rules: No human faces. Pets, environments, objects only.
No text, captions, watermarks, or logos rendered in the image.
Palette: sage green, warm cream/gallery, off-black ink. Editorial, not cartoonish.
Composition leaves a calm negative-space area top-left for title overlay.
